properties.description: Unique identifier for daily aggregated attrition risk record.
properties.business_rules: Must be unique, Cannot be null
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for each daily attrition risk snapshot.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate uniqueness, Ensure daily records exist
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific date

properties.description: Date of the aggregated attrition risk assessment.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be a valid date
properties.business_description: Reference date for daily snapshot of organizational attrition risk.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure not in future, Validate date format, Check for missing dates
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by specific date
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by date, GROUP BY month

properties.description: Total number of active employees assessed for attrition risk.
properties.business_description: Total headcount under attrition monitoring for calculating organizational flight risk exposure.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure positive values, Compare with User_csod active count

properties.description: Average composite attrition risk score across all employees.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Primary KPI for organizational talent retention health, indicating overall flight risk across enterprise.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Monitor for significant changes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Compare to previous periods

properties.description: Median composite attrition risk score, less sensitive to outliers.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Robust central tendency showing typical employee flight risk unaffected by extreme cases.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate range 0-100, Compare with average for skew detection

properties.description: Number of employees with critical attrition risk (75-100).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalEmployees
properties.business_description: Volume of employees at imminent risk of departure requiring immediate retention intervention.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure non-negative, Validate <= totalEmployees, Monitor for spikes
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, AVERAGE, TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Number of employees with high attrition risk (50-75).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalEmployees
properties.business_description: Volume of employees at elevated departure risk requiring proactive retention strategies.

properties.description: Number of employees with moderate attrition risk (25-50).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalEmployees
properties.business_description: Volume of employees at medium flight risk requiring standard monitoring.

properties.description: Number of employees with low attrition risk (0-25).
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalEmployees
properties.business_description: Volume of stable employees with low departure risk.

properties.description: Average organizational impact if employees depart.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Indicates average potential disruption from departures, guiding retention investment priorities.

properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be between 0 and 100
properties.business_description: Indicates overall organizational retention health and culture effectiveness.

properties.description: Number of employees requiring HR retention intervention.
properties.business_rules: Cannot be null, Must be >= 0, Must be <= totalEmployees
properties.business_description: Action queue size for HR team, indicating volume requiring immediate retention focus.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Filter by non-zero
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, AVERAGE, TREND, PERCENTAGE of total

properties.description: Number of people managers at high/critical flight risk.
properties.business_description: Volume of managers at departure risk with potential secondary attrition impact on their teams.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Monitor for spikes
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, TREND, PERCENTAGE of manager population

properties.business_description: Organizational tenure health indicator; declining tenure suggests systemic retention issues.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Monitor for declining trends

properties.description: Number of employees in 0-6 month tenure band at high/critical risk.
properties.business_description: Early-stage attrition indicator suggesting onboarding or culture fit issues requiring immediate attention.
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by date range, Monitor for patterns
properties.aggregation_suggestions: SUM, PERCENTAGE of new hires, TREND

properties.description: Overall attrition risk trend compared to previous day.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first record, Valid values: 'Increasing', 'Decreasing', 'Stable'
properties.business_description: Day-over-day risk direction, early warning of deteriorating retention environment.

properties.description: Percentage change in average attrition risk from previous day.
properties.business_rules: Can be null for first record, Positive indicates increasing risk
properties.business_description: Quantifies magnitude of risk changes for threshold-based alerting.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate reasonable range, Flag extreme changes

properties.displayName: Daily Aggregates to Source Assessments Relationship
properties.description: Each daily summary aggregates all employee risk assessments for that date
Gold layer table containing daily aggregated attrition risk metrics providing enterprise-wide visibility into talent retention health.
properties.business_purpose: Enables executive dashboards, daily talent retention scorecards, trend analysis, and real-time monitoring of organizational flight risk exposure.
properties.data_lineage: Aggregated from AttritionRisk_Silver table with daily refresh.
properties.data_retention: Data retained for 3 years for long-term trend analysis.
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by assessmentDate for daily trend analysis", "Group by division or position for organizational risk reporting", "Calculate aggregate risk metrics (avgRiskScore, totalHighRiskEmployees)", "Filter by riskLevel for executive dashboards", "Join with User_csod for organizational context", "Calculate week-over-week and month-over-month comparisons", "Filter by engagementTrend for engagement analysis", "Group by tenureBand for cohort risk analysis"]
properties.useCases: ["Executive Dashboards: Provide daily aggregated attrition risk metrics for leadership", "Talent Retention Scorecards: Generate daily organizational flight risk summaries", "Trend Analysis: Track organizational risk trends over time", "Risk Reporting: Monitor aggregate risk metrics by division and position", "Strategic Planning: Use aggregated data for talent retention strategies", "Real-time Monitoring: Track organizational flight risk exposure daily", "Cohort Analysis: Analyze risk patterns across organizational segments", "Performance Tracking: Measure effectiveness of retention interventions"]
